x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: IRE identification rules prevent duplicate CIs from being created by discovery. Well-configured IRE means the CMDB stays clean as discovery runs, preserving the single-source-of-truth that Now Assist AI depends on.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure IRE identification rules for all key CI classes via cmdb_identifier_list.do. Ensure each class has strong identifier entries (serial number, MAC address, hostname). Target: 10+ active IRE rules. Well-configured IRE is the primary defense against duplicate CI creation.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_36f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c25
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[IRE identification rules prevent duplicate CIs from being created by discovery. Well-configured IRE means the CMDB stays clean as discovery runs, preserving the single-source-of-truth that Now Assist AI depends on.]]></ai_justification><check_name>IRE Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_identifier');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var rules = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = rules + ' active IRE identification rules';

    if (rules >= 10) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: rules + ' active IRE identification rules. Robust IRE configuration prevents duplicate CI creation and maintains CMDB integrity for Now Assist AI analysis.' };
    } else if (rules >= 1) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + rules + ' active IRE identification rule(s) (target: 10+). Limited IRE coverage increases the risk of duplicate CI creation — a primary source of Now Assist AI context fragmentation.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active IRE identification rules. Without IRE, every discovery run risks creating duplicate CIs — the primary source of CMDB data quality degradation that impacts Now Assist AI accuracy.' };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CMDB</module><number>CHK0000389</number><order>170</order><remediation_guidance>Configure IRE identification rules for all key CI classes via cmdb_identifier_list.do. Ensure each class has strong identifier entries (serial number, MAC address, hostname). Target: 10+ active IRE rules. Well-configured IRE is the primary defense against duplicate CI creation.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>36f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c25</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>IRE Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_36f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c25</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
